scripts.clean-start: powershell -Command "$ports = @(5002, 5173); foreach ($port in $ports) { $line = netstat -ano | findstr \":$port\"; if ($line) { $parts = $line -split '\\s+'; $pIdToKill = $parts[-1]; Write-Host \"Killing process $pIdToKill on port $port\"; taskkill /PID $pIdToKill /F; } else { Write-Host \"No process on port $port\" } }; pnpm dev"
scripts.dev: powershell -Command "& '.\kill-ports.ps1'; concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "pnpm -C artifacts/api-server dev" "pnpm -C artifacts/mindwellness dev""
